zh.lifeSummary: 當James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan於1442年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn43歲，母親Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland35歲。他於大約1468年與Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在英國蘇格蘭被列為king of scotland。他去世於1499年1月1日在蘇格蘭Forfarshire奧特豪斯享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan于1442年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn43岁，母亲Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland35岁。他于大约1468年与Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在英国苏格兰被列为king of scotland。他去世于1499年1月1日在苏格兰Forfarshire奧特豪斯享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培爾登可爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan was born in 1442, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn, was 43 and his mother, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, was 35. He married Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan about 1468. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as king of scotland in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 1 January 1499, in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan est né en 1442, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan environ 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est king of scotland à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1499, à Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan 1442 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn 43 und seine Mutter Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland 35. Er hat um 1468 Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als king of scotland in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Januar 1499 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan è nato il nel 1442 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan circa 1468. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come king of scotland nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 1 gennaio 1499, nel Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchanが1442年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lornは43歳，母Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotlandは35歳であった。約1468年にMargaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリススコットランドでの職業はking of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1499年1月1日にスコットランドForfarshireアウチテローウゼで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan(이)가 1442년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1468년 Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 king of scotland이었다. 그는 1499년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 오ch터하스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan nasceu em 1442, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan aproximadamente 1468. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como king of scotland em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1499, em Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan родился в 1442 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan около 1468 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии king of scotland в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 1 января 1499 г. в местности аучтироус, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan nació en 1442, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Sir James Stewart -The Black Knight of Lorn, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Joan Beaufort Queen Consort of Scotland, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margaret Ogilvy Heretrix of Auchterhouse - Countess of Buchan aproximadamente 1468. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era king of scotland en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 1 de enero de 1499, en Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
